Product.title: Product
Product.description: Product document storing details about a product available in the shop.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Customer order containing purchased items, contact information, shipping, and payment status.

Config.title: Config
Config.description: Generic document in the config collection, holds varying types of configurations like settings, categories, slides, carriers, payments.

/products/{productId}.description: Collection of products available for purchase.

/orders/{orderId}.description: Collection of orders placed by customers.

/config/{configName}.description: Store application configurations like sliders, categories, carriers, payments.
